title: Neural Network Components Path
description: Build fluency in Neural Network Components inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Residual Connections
steps.summary: Connections that allow the model to learn residual functions, often used in deep neural networks. It sits inside Neural Networks / Neural Network Components. Start after Residual Networks.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Encoder-Decoder Models Extensions

Start after Encoder-Decoder Models and Encoder-Decoder Architecture. It opens into Encoder-Decoder Models Extensions Techniques and Encoder-Decoder Models Extensions Extensions Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Bidirectional Encoder
